name: Seafood Enchiladas-- Lowfat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
2 cups Enchilada Sauce or Green Tomatillo Salsa (same name)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Heat garlic and oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat for 1 minute.
3. Cut shrimp into halves across their width and add to the skillet with scallops. Cook until shrimp are pink and scallops firm, about 2-3 minutes.
4. Stir in crabmeat and 1/3 cup of enchilada sauce or green tomatillo salsa. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. Steam or microwave tortillas for 10 seconds each to soften them slightly.
6. Spread 2/3 cup of sauce on an 8x14-inch pan's bottom.
7. Fill each tortilla with 1/4 cup seafood mixture, roll into a crepe, and place seam side up in the pan.
8. Pour remaining sauce over tortillas and sprinkle with grated cheese.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or microwave covered for 5 minutes on high.
YIELD: Serves 8
Each serving: 165 calories, 16.6g protein, 3.8g total fat, 17g carbs, 68.3mg cholesterol, 212mg sodium, 3.3g fiber, 130mg calcium
Exchanges: 2 meat, 1 starch, 1/2 vegetable
